decisions.name: Found_Contacts_Tie_to_Org_decision
decisions.label: Found Contacts Tie to Org decision

decisions.name: New_Primary_Contact_decision
decisions.label: New Primary Contact decision
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Error - No New Primary Contact Selected

rules.name: REC_Non_Primary_Chosen_No_Org_on_Contact
rules.label: REC - Non Primary Chosen - No Org on Contact

Flow.description: JH 11/19/24 - updated to clear out the new sales no show fields (discovery call, demo call decision call) MC 12/11/24 - added preferred language as a required field if unqualified - language barrier is selected
Flow.label: Contact - Screenflow - Recycled / Unqualified Process

fields.name: HelpText
fields.fieldText: ﻿Please select the New Primary Contact for this Organization

fields.name: HelpText2
fields.fieldText:
﻿Please select next and choose a new Primary Contact from the current Organization.


If a New Primary Contact is not needed, Cancel this transaction and select a different Final Disposition﻿

fields.name: HelpText3
fields.fieldText:
No other Contacts are tied to this Organization or this Contact is not tied to an Organization


Please select a different Final Disposition on Next Screen

fields.name: ContactInfo1
fields.fieldText:
Name: {!Get_Contact.Name}

Account Name: {!Get_Contact.Account.Name}

Phone: {!Get_Contact.Phone}

Email: {!Get_Contact.Email}

fields.name: ContactInfo2
fields.fieldText:
Outreach Stage: {!Get_Contact.Outreach_stage__c}

Most Recent Sequence:{!Get_Contact.RDNACadence__Cadence_ID__r.Name}

Latest Disposition:{!Get_Contact.ringdna100__Latest_Disposition__c}

validationRule.errorMessage: Target Resell Date must be greater than today and within 4 months.

fields.name: NonPrimaryHelpText
fields.fieldText: In order to use Recycled - Non Primary, a primary lead must be marked on the organization. If Primary contact is unknown do not use this disposition

fields.name: RECUsingFreeBW
fields.fieldText: In order to use Recycled - Not Interested - Using Free BW, Current Tech needs to be set to "Brightwheel free version"

validationRule.errorMessage: Target Resell Date must be greater than today and within 4 months.

fields.name: CurrentCustomerWarning
fields.fieldText: In order to use Unqualified - Existing Customer, Customer has to be already using Brightwheel - Premium

fields.name: Unknown_Error_Message
fields.fieldText: We were not able to find a record for this Contact. Please refresh your page and try again. If this error continues, please open a Zendesk ticket and a SysOps team member will assist.
